summary: E2E testing completed for new Construction CRM features: Auto-Cheque Creation, Site Engineer Mini Cashbook, and Accountant Petty Cash Management. All backend APIs (12/12 tests passed) and frontend features verified successfully. Test data: 1 project (Villa Vinothkumar - Coimbatore), 2 cheques (CHQ001 ₹300K, CHQ002 ₹200K), 2 petty cash entries (₹40K total).

features_tested.notes: Super Admin, Accountant, Site Engineer, CRE login all working correctly

features_tested.feature: Site Engineer Dashboard - Mini Cashbook tab
features_tested.notes: Shows Total Issued ₹40,000, Total Spent ₹0, Balance ₹40,000 with 2 petty cash entries

features_tested.feature: Site Engineer Dashboard - Petty Cash tab
features_tested.notes: Shows 2 petty cash entries with 'issued' status (₹15K cement purchase, ₹25K site materials)
Ramesh Kumar (SE) assigned to Villa Vinothkumar - Coimbatore project (payment_verified status)
2 incoming cheques visible: CHQ001 ₹3,00,000 and CHQ002 ₹2,00,000 from Mr. Vinothkumar babu, linked to Villa Vinothkumar - Coimbatore
Shows SE Ramesh Kumar with ₹40,000 issued, ₹0 spent, Balance ₹40,000

features_tested.feature: Accountant - View SE Mini Cashbook detail
features_tested.notes: Clicking 'View' shows Ramesh Kumar's Mini Cashbook with 2 petty cash entries table
Shows 'No new deals waiting' - Vinothkumar deal already converted to project (correct behavior)
Returns cashbook data with summary (total_issued, total_spent, total_balance) and project cashbooks
Returns site_engineers array with petty cash balances grouped by SE
Accepts JSON body {amount, remarks} correctly (not query param)
Returns specific SE's cashbook with user info and petty_cash array
Returns auto-created cheques with CHQ001 ₹300K and CHQ002 ₹200K
Returns empty array when no unconverted deals exist (Vinothkumar already converted)

critical_code_review_comments: Auto-cheque creation in convert-deal correctly creates incoming cheques with client details
Mini Cashbook correctly aggregates petty cash by project with income/expense tracking
Petty Cash Management groups SE data correctly with balance calculations
Issue petty cash endpoint correctly accepts JSON body instead of query params (fix verified)
context_for_next_testing_agent: E2E testing completed with clean database. New features verified: (1) Auto-cheque creation when CRE converts deal with cheque payment - creates incoming cheques linked to project, (2) Site Engineer Mini Cashbook tab - shows petty cash by project with income/expense tracking, (3) Accountant Petty Cash Management - clickable from expense categories, shows all SE balances with View button for detail. The /api/accountant/petty-cash/{id}/issue endpoint now correctly accepts JSON body {amount, remarks}.
